member.name: T:ErpDataImportValidator.Api.Controllers.ImportValidationController
member.summary: Validates ERP-style import files before they are loaded into downstream business processes.

member.name: M:ErpDataImportValidator.Api.Controllers.ImportValidationController.ValidateCsv(ErpDataImportValidator.Api.Models.ImportValidationUploadRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads a CSV file and returns a detailed validation report.
member.remarks: Use the sample file sample-data/invalid-supplier-invoices.csv to demonstrate structure issues, duplicate document detection, invalid supplier formats, and business-rule failures.

member.name: M:ErpDataImportValidator.Api.Controllers.ImportValidationController.ValidateXml(ErpDataImportValidator.Api.Models.ImportValidationUploadRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads an XML file and returns a detailed validation report.
member.remarks: Use the sample file sample-data/invalid-supplier-invoices.xml to demonstrate missing nodes, unsupported values, duplicate document detection, and future-date validation.

member.name: M:ErpDataImportValidator.Api.Controllers.ImportValidationController.GetSampleSummary
member.summary: Returns the bundled sample files and the active validation settings summary.

member.name: P:ErpDataImportValidator.Api.Models.ImportValidationUploadRequest.IncludePreview
member.summary: When true, the API returns a preview of parsed records in the response.

member.name: P:ErpDataImportValidator.Api.Models.ImportValidationUploadRequest.PreviewLimit
member.summary: Maximum number of preview records to include in the response. Allowed range: 0 to 50.

member.name: P:ErpDataImportValidator.Api.Models.ImportValidationUploadRequest.Mode
member.summary: Optional validation mode override. Use Relaxed mode to downgrade certain business-rule findings to warnings.
